<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Mime; /** * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ interface MimeTypesInterface extends MimeTypeGuesserInterface { /** * Gets the extensions for the given MIME type in decreasing order of preference. * * @return string[] */ public function getExtensions(string $mimeType): array; /** * Gets the MIME types for the given extension in decreasing order of preference. * * @return string[] */ public function getMimeTypes(string $ext): array; }
